ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #123-4567890-1234567 has shipped
ham.body:
Hello John Doe,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon. Your order #123-4567890-1234567 has shipped. Tracking number: 1Z999AA10123456789. It will arrive on Monday, April 15, 2026.

If you have any questions, contact customer service.

Regards,
Amazon.com

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – IT Support Ticket #987654
spam.body:
Dear John,

We have detected a security issue with your account. The system has flagged a potential unauthorized login attempt from an unrecognized device. To protect your data, we require you to confirm your identity and reset your password immediately. Failure to comply within 24 hours may result in suspension of your account.

Please click <URL> to verify your credentials.

If you do not respond, we will be forced to lock your account.

Thank you,
IT Support Team
